languages.text: "Невозможная точность векторных расчетов. По всей видимости, ваше мнение необходимо включить в принятую разметку реальности, сколь бы мне не претила эта точка отсчета. В конце концов, вы превзошли меня меня в моей собственной игре. Это не удавалось даже Себериану".

traits.locale_text: "Невозможная точность векторных расчетов. По всей видимости, ваше мнение необходимо включить в принятую разметку реальности, сколь бы мне не претила эта точка отсчета. В конце концов, вы превзошли меня меня в моей собственной игре. Это не удавалось даже Себериану".

languages.text: "Such precision of vector calculations is impossible. It appears that your perspective must be incorporated into the accepted mapping of reality, however much I may find this reference point abhorrent. After all, you have surpassed me at my own game. Not even Seberian ever managed that."
languages.original_text: "Невозможная точность векторных расчетов. По всей видимости, ваше мнение необходимо включить в принятую разметку реальности, сколь бы мне не претила эта точка отсчета. В конце концов, вы превзошли меня меня в моей собственной игре. Это не удавалось даже Себериану".

traits.locale_text: "An impossible precision of vector calculations. It appears that your perspective must be incorporated into the accepted mapping of reality, however much I may find this reference point abhorrent. After all, you have surpassed me at my own game. Not even Seberian ever managed that."

"An impossible precision of vector calculations. It appears that your perspective must be incorporated into the accepted mapping of reality, however much I may find this reference point abhorrent. After all, you have surpassed me at my own game. Not even Seberian ever managed that."

"Such precision of vector calculations is impossible. It appears that your perspective must be incorporated into the accepted mapping of reality, however much I may find this reference point abhorrent. After all, you have surpassed me at my own game. Not even Seberian ever managed that."

"Such precision of vector calculations is impossible. It appears that your perspective must be incorporated into the accepted mapping of reality, however much I may find this reference point abhorrent. After all, you have surpassed me at my own game. Not even Seberian ever managed that."

languages.text: «Esta precisión de cálculos vectoriales es imposible. Al parecer, debo incorporar su perspectiva en el mapeado aceptado de la realidad, por abominable que me resulte el punto de referencia. A fin de cuentas, me ha superado en mi propio juego, algo que ni siquiera Seberian había logrado».
languages.original_text: "Such precision of vector calculations is impossible. It appears that your perspective must be incorporated into the accepted mapping of reality, however much I may find this reference point abhorrent. After all, you have surpassed me at my own game. Not even Seberian ever managed that."

traits.locale_text: «Esta precisión de cálculos vectoriales es imposible. Al parecer, debo incorporar su perspectiva en el mapeado aceptado de la realidad, por abominable que me resulte el punto de referencia. A fin de cuentas, me ha superado en mi propio juego, algo que ni siquiera Seberian había logrado».

languages.text: “如此精确的向量计算根本不可能存在。看来无论我多么厌恶这个参照点，也不得不将你的视角纳入现实测绘体系之中了。毕竟，你已经在我设计的游戏中胜过了我。而这一点就连塞贝里安都没能做到。”
languages.original_text: "Such precision of vector calculations is impossible. It appears that your perspective must be incorporated into the accepted mapping of reality, however much I may find this reference point abhorrent. After all, you have surpassed me at my own game. Not even Seberian ever managed that."

traits.locale_text: “如此精确的向量计算根本不可能存在。看来无论我多么厌恶这个参照点，也不得不将你的视角纳入现实测绘体系之中了。毕竟，你已经在我设计的游戏中胜过了我。而这一点就连塞贝里安都没能做到。”

languages.text: « Une telle précision dans les calculs vectoriels est tout bonnement impossible. Il semblerait que votre perspective doive être intégrée à la modélisation acceptée de la réalité, si détestable que me paraisse ce point de référence. Après tout, vous m'avez battu à mon propre jeu, un exploit que Seberian lui-même n'a jamais réussi. »
languages.original_text: "Such precision of vector calculations is impossible. It appears that your perspective must be incorporated into the accepted mapping of reality, however much I may find this reference point abhorrent. After all, you have surpassed me at my own game. Not even Seberian ever managed that."

traits.locale_text: « Une telle précision dans les calculs vectoriels est tout bonnement impossible. Il semblerait que votre perspective doive être intégrée à la modélisation acceptée de la réalité, si détestable que me paraisse ce point de référence. Après tout, vous m'avez battu à mon propre jeu, un exploit que Seberian lui-même n'a jamais réussi. »

languages.text: "Vektör hesaplamalarının böylesi bir hassasiyeti imkânsızdır. Görünüşe göre bu referans noktasını ne kadar iğrenç bulsam da bu perspektifin kabul edilen gerçeklik haritasına dâhil edilmesi gerekiyor. Ne de olsa beni kendi oyunumda alt ettiniz. Seberian bile bunu asla başaramamıştı."
languages.original_text: "Such precision of vector calculations is impossible. It appears that your perspective must be incorporated into the accepted mapping of reality, however much I may find this reference point abhorrent. After all, you have surpassed me at my own game. Not even Seberian ever managed that."

traits.locale_text: "Vektör hesaplamalarının böylesi bir hassasiyeti imkânsızdır. Görünüşe göre bu referans noktasını ne kadar iğrenç bulsam da bu perspektifin kabul edilen gerçeklik haritasına dâhil edilmesi gerekiyor. Ne de olsa beni kendi oyunumda alt ettiniz. Seberian bile bunu asla başaramamıştı."

languages.text: 「そんなベクトル計算の精度なんて不可能だ。君の見方は、どんなに嫌悪感を持っても、現実の地図に組み込まれる必要があるようだ。結局のところ、君は自分のゲームで私を超えた。シベリア人もそんなことはできなかった。」
languages.original_text: "Such precision of vector calculations is impossible. It appears that your perspective must be incorporated into the accepted mapping of reality, however much I may find this reference point abhorrent. After all, you have surpassed me at my own game. Not even Seberian ever managed that."

traits.locale_text: 「そんなベクトル計算の精度なんて不可能だ。君の見方は、どんなに嫌悪感を持っても、現実の地図に組み込まれる必要があるようだ。結局のところ、君は自分のゲームで私を超えた。シベリア人もそんなことはできなかった。」

languages.text: "Derart präzise Vektorberechnungen sind unmöglich. Eure Perspektive muss in die akzeptierte Wahrnehmung der Realität eingebunden sein, egal, wie abstoßend ich diesen Referenzpunkt finde. Immerhin habt Ihr mich in meinem eigenen Spiel geschlagen. Das hat nicht einmal Seberian geschafft."
languages.original_text: "Such precision of vector calculations is impossible. It appears that your perspective must be incorporated into the accepted mapping of reality, however much I may find this reference point abhorrent. After all, you have surpassed me at my own game. Not even Seberian ever managed that."

traits.locale_text: "Derart präzise Vektorberechnungen sind unmöglich. Eure Perspektive muss in die akzeptierte Wahrnehmung der Realität eingebunden sein, egal, wie abstoßend ich diesen Referenzpunkt finde. Immerhin habt Ihr mich in meinem eigenen Spiel geschlagen. Das hat nicht einmal Seberian geschafft."
